name: chain-fields
instruction: Modify `describe_product` to return `"name: $price"` format instead of just the name. For example, if the product is "Laptop" with price 999, return `"Laptop: 999"`. Use `"${p.name}: ${int.to_string(p.price)}"`. Keep the not-found case returning `"N/A"`. Do not change any other function.
layer3_hint: Available: `list.find(xs, (x) => bool)` returns `Option[A]`. `int.to_string(n)` converts Int to String. String interpolation: `"${expr}"`. `list.filter(xs, (x) => bool)` filters elements.
